title: callicarpa macrophylla
intro: Callicarpa macrophylla, also known as the purple berry vine or large-leaf purple berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, where its berries, leaves, and stems are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa macrophylla include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
